description_long: This object appears to be a pair of modern, minimalist eyeglasses with a thin, metallic frame. The temples are long and slender, curving gently at the ends, and the bridge is also thin, connecting the two lens rims. The frame has a sleek, angular design, with sharp lines and a lightweight appearance. The metallic finish gives the object a reflective, polished look, suggesting it is made from a high-quality metal such as stainless steel or titanium. There are no visible embellishments, screws, or nose pads, emphasizing a streamlined, contemporary aesthetic. The overall proportions and style are consistent with eyewear designed for adults.
description: A pair of thin, metallic, minimalist eyeglasses with a sleek, angular frame and long, slender temples.
description_view_0: Close-up of the angular metallic frame and the junction of the temples with the bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme thinness and length of the temple arms.
description_view_2: Partial view showing the lower rim and the sharp, geometric lines of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the straight, elongated temple and the frame's minimal profile.
